signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Dominates X Chatter | YES (heavy trading activity) | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Market Dominates X Chatter | YES (heavy trading activity) | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's "Elon Musk # tweets April 10 - April 17, 2026?" market leads discussions on X, with 88% odds on 300-319 tweets and $13M+ volume across 28 active Tweet Markets; traders highlight it as the most active, updating in real-time.[3][4]
